name: Green Tomato Chutney II
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green tomatoes into desired pieces.
2. Peel and chop the onions and apples.
3. Place the mixed pickling spice in a muslin bag.
4. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil, stirring occasionally until the mixture is tender and thick.
5. Remove the spice bag and pour the contents into hot, dry jars, ensuring they are sealed tightly.
Spiced vinegar can also be used instead of mixed pickling spice.
